parentQuestion: Select the correct statement regarding epithelia.

scaffolds.explain: Stratified means arranged in multiple layers or strata. Stratified epithelium has cells stacked on top of each other in layers, as opposed to simple epithelium which has only one layer.

scaffolds.q: What kind of stress would require protective tissue?
scaffolds.explain: Abrasion and mechanical wear (rubbing, friction) damage surface tissues. Areas subject to abrasion need thicker, more protective epithelium with multiple layers.
